chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-895 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 01-04-2019 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press this criminal miscellaneous application, however, states that the applicant shall avail her remedy by filing direct complain under section 200 Cr.P.C. Accordingly, this criminal miscellaneous application stands dismissed as not pressed. The applicant, however, left at liberty to avail remedy if permissible under the law. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
